## We Say

CarPro IronX is a pH-balanced, acid-free decontaminant, designed specifically to dissolve ferrous iron particles embedded in your car's paint, wheels, and other surfaces. Over time, tiny particles from brake dust and industrial fallout cling to your car, causing rust spots and even clear coat damage. CarPro IronX tackles this with a chemical process that bonds with these iron particles at the molecular level, breaking them down safely without harming the surface.
One of the coolest things about CarPro IronX is the colour change reaction. When the formula comes in contact with iron particles, it turns a deep purple as it starts working, which is both satisfying and helpful – you can actually see it going to work! This reaction is due to an indicator that shows where iron contamination is heaviest, so you know exactly where to focus.
CarPro IronX’s formulation is incredibly effective, yet gentle enough not to damage paint, alloy, or other delicate materials. Unlike harsher acids, this solution relies on a controlled pH-neutral chemistry that’s safe for use on all surfaces. Simply spray it on, let it dwell for a few minutes (letting that purple reaction happen), and then rinse it off. It’s impressive how smooth and clean everything feels afterward – you’re literally left with a contaminant-free, polished surface ready for waxing or sealing.
For anyone serious about deep cleaning and maintaining their vehicle, IronX is an absolute must-have. Its chemical process is a true example of smart detailing science, and the results are nothing short of professional.

## Description

**The Ultimate Solution for Decontaminating Your Car’s Paint and Wheels**

When it comes to achieving a truly pristine, contaminant-free finish on your car’s paint and wheels, **CarPro IronX Iron Remover** is the professional-grade solution detailers trust worldwide. Designed to target and dissolve embedded ferrous particles, CarPro IronX goes beyond conventional cleaning, ensuring your vehicle’s surface is as smooth, clean, and protected as possible. It’s an essential pre-wash step for any car enthusiast or professional detailer looking to maintain a showroom-quality appearance.

#### What is CarPro IronX Iron Remover?

CarPro IronX is a powerful, pH-balanced iron decontamination spray specially formulated to target iron fallout from your vehicle’s paint and wheels. Whether it’s brake dust, industrial fallout, or airborne iron particles, these contaminants are not only unsightly but can also compromise the durability of your car’s clear coat if left untreated. CarPro IronX’s unique formula chemically dissolves these iron deposits safely, transforming contaminants into a water-soluble form that easily rinses away.

**1. Exceptional Iron Removal Power**: CarPro IronX is formulated to tackle even the most stubborn iron particles on paint, wheels, and other surfaces. It actively bonds to ferrous particles, loosening and dissolving them on contact.

**2. pH-Balanced & Safe on All Surfaces**: This iron remover is pH-neutral, making it safe for use on clear coats, glass, aluminium, chrome, and more. CarPro IronX will not damage your paint, ensuring a smooth and residue-free finish.

**3. Visual Colour Indicator**: IronX features a visual purple colour-changing effect, signalling when iron particles are being dissolved. This allows you to see the product working in real-time, ensuring thorough decontamination.

**4. Improved Paint & Sealant Longevity**: By removing iron contaminants that can penetrate paint layers and cause oxidation, CarPro IronX helps extend the lifespan of waxes, sealants, and coatings applied afterward, ensuring long-lasting protection.

**5. Effortless Application**: With a simple spray-on, dwell, and rinse-off application process, CarPro IronX saves time while delivering powerful results.

### Why Choose CarPro IronX Iron Remover?

For car owners who value both appearance and preservation, CarPro IronX is an ideal solution. Iron particles are not only common on the vehicle's wheels but can also settle on the paint, especially in urban or industrial areas. These particles embed themselves in the paint and can cause long-term damage. CarPro IronX offers a fast, effective, and safe way to remove these contaminants, ensuring your paint remains pristine and ready for wax, sealant, or coating application.

#### Ideal for Professional and Enthusiast Use

CarPro IronX Iron Remover is trusted by professional detailers for its efficiency and ease of use. For enthusiasts, it provides peace of mind, knowing that contaminants that can harm paintwork and wheels are safely removed, preserving the vehicle’s appearance and value.

#### Experience the CarPro Difference with IronX

CarPro IronX Iron Remover is a game-changer in the world of automotive detailing, delivering a cleaner, smoother, and contaminant-free surface that ensures better product adherence and finish quality. Protect your investment and achieve a flawless shine with CarPro IronX, the industry-standard iron remover for detailers and enthusiasts alike.

**Order CarPro IronX Iron Remover today and elevate your detailing experience with unmatched contaminant removal and shine-enhancing power!**

## How To Use

CarPro IronX comes pre-diluted to the correct strength for safe exterior use.

In all cases, wash and rinse the surfaces you are going to treat in the normal way. Next, working on 3-4 panels at a time, spray CarPro IronX on liberally and allow 3-5 minutes for it to work; during this interval the initially transparent solution will gradually turn a deep red as ferrous compounds and sintered iron particles dissolve into solution (this effect can be very pronounced, but don't panic because it's quite normal and to be expected). Although IronX is essentially a touchless cleaner, you can agitate it with a microfibre towel if needs be (we recommend using a PB Disposable Towel). After 3-5 minutes, rinse the surfaces you have treated with a strong stream of water. Note that if the solution has begun to dry you may need to use a stronger jet of water from a pressure washer to remove the residue. After rinsing off, check the treated surfaces for residual contamination by running your fingertips over them while they are still wet. Contaminant-free surfaces should feel perfectly smooth (if your fingertips aren't particularly sensitive you can magnify your sense of touch by putting your fingers inside a cellophane wrapper first). If you can detect any grittiness then it's likely that the treated surfaces are still contaminated with non-ferrous particulates (e.g. paint overspray) and will need to be carefully clayed before any polishing is done or any protection is applied.
